channel.title: sentence transformers on Digital Forays
channel.description: Recent content in sentence transformers on Digital Forays

item.title: The Bard Aboard the Enterprise: Tracking Shakespeare References in Star Trek: The Next Generation
item.description: So, recently, I’ve been watching episodes of Star Trek: The Next Generation, which is available on Paramound. I’m not sure why, frankly. Honestly, I was watching them for the first time—yes, I know, embarrassingly late to the party (I am old enough to have caught snatches and snippets from it when it originally aired)—and within the first two episodes I had already noticed a couple of Shakespeare references. In the pilot, a character quips something very close to a line from Henry VI about killing all the lawyers; in the second episode, Data—the android crew member whose entire arc is about what it means to be human—says something to the effect of “If you prick me, do I not leak?
